Document symlink trick for whole-directory rw mounts

Directories with children in home_rw/ are mounted entry-by-entry,
causing new files (e.g. gh hosts.yml) to be lost on exit. Document
the workaround: symlink to an external directory so it mounts as
a single unit. Update setup example for .ssh and .config/gh.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use remotes.d config files instead of flatpak CLI in chroot

flatpak remote-add needs /proc mounted, which isn't available in the
chroot after lb chroot completes. Drop .flatpakrepo files into
/etc/flatpak/remotes.d/ instead — the standard way to pre-configure
remotes in distro images, with no chroot execution needed.

Strip stale result fields when serving today's picks (no app rebuild needed)

Add _strip_results_for_today() helper that removes result/match_status/scores
from picks when the requested date is today UTC. This prevents Firestore docs
that have result:'won' from a previous day's data being served as finished
picks for today's still-pending games. Applied to both /api/picks/<date> and
/api/rollover-picks/<date> Firestore fast paths.

commit.message:
Add Facebook video URLs to video platform detection

facebook.com/reel, facebook.com/watch, and fb.watch were not recognized
as video URLs, causing them to be processed as web pages (text-only)
instead of being downloaded and analyzed as videos.

commit.message:
perf(status): full-bleed timeline layout on wide viewports

The 24-Hour Timeline section was capped at 896px (max-w-7xl) leaving
40-66% unused horizontal space on wide monitors. Use CSS breakout
pattern (w-screen + left-1/2 + -ml-[50vw]) so the timeline escapes
the page container and fills the viewport, with a 2400px safety cap
for ultrawides. Add overflow-x-hidden on body to prevent horizontal
scrollbar from 100vw including scrollbar width.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix SSL no-verify: pass function pointer, not pointer-to-pointer

LDAP_OPT_SERVER_CERTIFICATE requires the function pointer itself
as invalue. Passing (void*)&fn gave Schannel the address of a local
stack variable (i.e. a pointer-to-pointer), so the callback was never
registered and Schannel's default chain verification ran — rejecting
self-signed certificates.

Fix: (void*)&fn → (void*)fn

Also add explicit ldap_connect() before ldap_simple_bind_sW() so the
SSL handshake occurs after all options (including the cert callback)
are set, rather than lazily at bind time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(bulls-and-cows): implement code-breaking game with 1p/2p modes

Adds Bulls and Cows (Mastermind) game with two variants:
- Colors mode: 6 colors (R/B/G/Y/O/P), 4 pegs
- Numbers mode: Digits 0-9, 4 digits

Features:
- 1-player mode: Play against AI opponent
- 2-player mode: Real-time gameplay via SSE
- Mobile-first UI with touch-friendly controls
- Bulls/cows feedback with visual badges (✓ green, ~ yellow)
- Guess history with scrolling
- Activity Hub CSS integration
- PostgreSQL database with games/guesses tables
- Redis pub/sub for SSE real-time updates

Backend (port 4091):
- Game logic with code generation and validation
- Bulls/cows scoring algorithm
- RESTful API (create game, submit guess, get state)
- SSE streaming with auto-reconnect

Frontend:
- TypeScript React with Activity Hub CSS
- Mode selection (colors/numbers)
- Variant selection (1p/2p)
- Interactive guess builder with auto-advance
- Real-time connection status indicator
- Game board CSS in bulls-and-cows-board.css

Updated start_core.sh to include Bulls and Cows service.

Add core tests (25 tests, all passing)

- Photo intake: photo-only prompt, caption shortcut, photo replacement
- Fresh flow: text/voice follow-up, no-photo guard
- Stale flows: reuse prompt, pending request preservation, yes/no
  confirmation, new photo while awaiting confirmation (trickiest path)
- Rate limiting: blocks fresh follow-up, caption shortcut, stale confirm
- Error handling: LLM error → friendly message

test_state.py — PhotoStore TTL boundaries and RateLimiter:
- Fresh/stale/expired boundary correctness
- TTL reset, cleanup counts
- Rate limiter blocks at limit, resets on day rollover

run on Python 3.14 without the pydantic v1 crash.

commit.message:
fix: redirect / and * to /login, move groups list to /groups

Root path '/' was rendering ProtectedRoute → GroupListPage which threw
an error boundary in production because API calls hit CloudFront (no
backend proxy) and returned unexpected responses.

Changes:
- '/' and '*' now explicitly redirect to /login — no ProtectedRoute
  or data-fetching component involved at all
- Groups list moved from '/' to '/groups' (more semantic URL)
- Post-login redirect updated from '/' to '/groups'
